name: Buck Park
description: Buck Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Eastsound, WA. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: See playtime scheduler.  See orcaspickleball.org for club special events and information.

name: Cahail Park
description: Cahail Park is a place to play pickleball in Friday Harbor, WA. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court cannot be reserved. The court is free. Players have access to lights.

name: Kane's Court
description: Private Residential Court.  No public access.

name: Lopez Island Community Tennis Courts
description: Lopez Island Community Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in Lopez Island, WA. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to water. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: OI - New Gym in Eastsound
description: OI - New Gym in Eastsound is a place to play pickleball in Eastsound, WA. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Orcas Island School District
description: Orcas Island School District is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Eastsound, WA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Roche Harbor Resort Pickleball and Tennis court
description: Roche Harbor Resort Pickleball and Tennis court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Friday Harbor, WA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: San Juan County Fairgrounds
description: San Juan County Fairgrounds is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Friday Harbor, WA. There are 4 indoor concrete courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.

name: San Juan Golf and Country Club
description: Court Reservations and Fees Required.  Inquire at Pro Shop.

name: SJI - High School in Friday Harbor
description: For use by public outside of school hours.
